title: Small Utilities
description: Improves the game with new mechanics, blocks, items and more.
body:
# Small Utilities
Improves the game with new mechanics, blocks, items and more.  
<u>**ALPHA/BETA VERSIONS CAN HAVE BREAKING CHANGES**</u>

## Features
 * 💻 A laptop, you can open/close.  
 * ☕ Table and coffee table.  
 * ♻️ Working trash can.  
 * ✨ Some more features.  

## Source Code
It's available on [GitHub](https://github.com/Ultreon/small-utilities).
